source_files: Trade_CropsLivestock_E_All_Data_(Normalized).zip (retained for future detailed trade review; core import/export uses Food Balance total Rice and products)
meta.matching_key: UN M49 numeric_code / FAOSTAT Area Code (M49)
meta.note_ja: FAOSTAT正規化データからFull196へ突合。台湾・香港・マカオはFAOSTAT側のM49 158/344/446で突合。
meta.trade_fallback_note_ja: 輸入量・輸出量は原則Food Balance SheetsのRice and productsを使用。不足する国・地域のみTradeの米関連品目（27/28/31/32）合算で補完。
meta.auto_update_policy: Official data is intended to be fetched on a semiannual schedule by GitHub Actions or a maintainer-run script, then transformed to static JSON and QA checked before publication.
meta.ranking_policy: All publishable rice metrics are ranked from the same generated JSON; missing values are excluded.
